{
  "claims": [
    "This year’s budget invests billions in California’s future.",
    "The budget actions equal $14.7 billion in relief that will boost a robust path to recovery for communities.",
    "Over the next three years, California will invest $3.7 billion to build climate resilience and safeguard the state.",
    "California has more than $12 billion in new funding for housing and homelessness programs over the next two years.",
    "This spending comes with strong oversight and accountability to ensure the funds are put to work to successfully alleviate homelessness.",
    "With this budget package, reserves will be a record $25.5 billion in 2021-22."
  ]
}
